problem_statement: Readiness gates and accepted-risk notes exist, but the control plane lacks a schema-backed review packet that captures waiver scope, expiry, compensating controls, approval needs, rollback evidence, incident handoff, and blocked promotion authority before any readiness waiver can be considered.
success_criteria: ReadinessWaiverReviewPacket validates against a public JSON schema and Foundation Mode example

ReadinessWaiverReviewPacket binds source readiness, violated readiness checks, UAO ref, expiry, compensating controls, approval status, accepted-risk status, rollback status, and incident handoff status
ReadinessWaiverReviewPacket blocks waiver grant, deployment mutation, production promotion, external exposure, terminal closure, and readiness success claims in Foundation Mode
ReadinessWaiverReviewPacket records required evidence refs and blocked reason refs
ReadinessWaiverReviewPacket is covered by a focused validator, root test, protocol manifest entry, proof coverage matrix entry, and CI hook
constraints: waiver_granted remains false in the Foundation example
deployment_mutation_allowed remains false in the Foundation example
Phi_gov authorization remains absent until future evidence exists
operator approval remains absent until future evidence exists
accepted-risk expiry evidence remains absent until future evidence exists
rollback recovery evidence remains absent until future evidence exists
incident handoff evidence remains absent until future evidence exists
